endpoints.name: Topple the Statue (War of the Spark / WAR-35)

description: Paired story-spotlight beats of WAR's Bolas-Falls narrative arc. Topple is the Act 2 spotlight (Nissa's Vitu-Ghazi fells Bolas's Ravnican statue as a morale rally) and Despark is the Act 3 spotlight (Liliana, freed from Bolas's contract, turns the corrupted God-Eternals Oketra and Bontu against him). Both are designer-tagged Story Spotlight uncommons in the same set's Bolas-defeat cluster.
citations: [Scryfall: story_spotlight: true on both WAR-35 and WAR-190]
[MTG Wiki: War of the Spark Story Spotlights]

other_candidates_considered.candidate: Bolas-Falls cluster as a Nodeley node proposal (Despark + Topple the Statue + Prison Realm)
other_candidates_considered.why_skipped: Prison Realm is in wave 2's triviabot batch but its MD has Vision only (no Trivia section landed yet). With only 2 trivia-passed cluster members, the Nodeley threshold (3+ shared-concept cards) is not met. Flagging this as a Mr. Nodeley candidate once Prison Realm's trivia pass lands; a war-of-the-spark/bolas-falls-cluster MD (or a story-spotlights cycle node, or a bolas-falls character/event node) would anchor Despark + Topple + Prison Realm + future cluster members (Awakening of Vitu-Ghazi, Enter the God-Eternals, The Elderspell, Deliver Unto Evil, Spark Harvest) cleanly.

other_candidates_considered.candidate: Gatewatch Triumph cycle (Jace's Triumph + Nissa's Triumph)
other_candidates_considered.why_skipped: Only Jace's Triumph is trivia-passed in wave 2. Nissa's Triumph has Vision but no Trivia section landed. Insufficient for a 1:1 trivia-aware edge AND below the Nodeley 3+ threshold. Flagging for a future pass: the 5-card Kieran Yanner Triumph cycle (Gideon WAR-15, Jace WAR-55, Liliana WAR-98, Chandra WAR-121, Nissa WAR-170) bookends the Hour of Devastation Defeat cycle and is a strong future Nodeley node-proposal once 3+ Triumph cards are trivia-passed.

REJECTED — wrong factions. Vito is Church of Dusk / Legion of Dusk on Ixalan; Pitiless Pontiff is Orzhov Syndicate on Ravnica. They do NOT share the Orzhov Signet throne motif: Vito's Vision describes a generic gothic cathedral with pointed arches and ribbed vaults, with NO eclipsed-sun signet behind him, and his frontmatter has no `symbols:` field. They share only the priest-vampire visual archetype — a tag bridge, not an edge. The caller's framing 'both Orzhov, both with the Orzhov Signet on their thrones' is factually incorrect; conflating their factions would corrupt the graph.

other_candidates_considered.candidate: Tamiyo Collector of Tales ↔ Tamiyo Meets the Story Circle
other_candidates_considered.why_skipped: Tamiyo Meets the Story Circle has Vision but no Trivia section landed (not in trivia_pending queue either). Drawing a 1:1 named-character-identity edge to an un-trivia-passed endpoint would be premature; the trivia layer carries the story-circle / scholarship-arc grounding that makes the edge load-bearing. Strong candidate for a future pass once trivia is applied to the MH3 saga.

other_candidates_considered.candidate: Despark ↔ Liliana, Dreadhorde General (named character + adjacent narrative beat)
other_candidates_considered.why_skipped: Liliana, Dreadhorde General is cited in Despark's Related cards as the same-character planeswalker from the same set, but is not in our enriched corpus this wave. Future pass candidate.
